calculation_rule: Percentages are bounded estimates for the defined workstream denominator, not universal completion claims. Blocked work can remain high-progress where only external proof is missing.

completed_this_pass.scope: Constitution v1.1 adds governed automatic intake, chronology, dedupe, repository/PR reconciliation, domain separation and external-staging gates.
Current request, eight inaccessible ChatGPT share links, five connected repositories, visible PR state and project denominators registered with truthful access boundaries.
One canonical priority tally supersedes V17 while preserving all earlier trackers as lineage.

priority_tally.proven: June export denominator and duplicate archive hash are verified.
priority_tally.gap: No genuinely newer export; eight share-link bodies inaccessible.
priority_tally.next_action: Ingest a newer ChatGPT export or explicit later-chat source pack, hash it, calculate delta and update chronology.

priority_tally.proven: 83 conversations and 32,239 messages are denominator-mapped; shared XRP/HBAR source bucket and prior tracker logic exist.
priority_tally.gap: Direct conversation bodies are not available in the current source set.
priority_tally.next_action: Extract each direct chat into request, response, claim, catalyst, probability, conflict, module and implementation-delta records after source access.

priority_tally.proven: Dedicated service contracts, Hub event consumer, update logic and historical tracking requirements exist.
priority_tally.gap: No current full 50-100-source production run, connected provider proof or live probability refresh was executed in this tranche.
priority_tally.next_action: Implement source-budget policy, official/news/social source classes, freshness/dedupe scoring, probability-change evidence and trigger-button orchestration; run in staging when credentials are approved.

priority_tally.proven: 8 conversations and 8,672 messages mapped to a shared finance/tax/trust bucket.
priority_tally.gap: Direct Tax chat bodies and current-law assertion register are not separately reconciled.
priority_tally.next_action: Extract as an isolated legal/tax batch and verify current assertions against official Australian sources.

priority_tally.proven: 17 conversations and 11,478 messages mapped to the shared finance/tax/trust bucket.
priority_tally.gap: Direct Active Trust bodies, deed/document dependencies and adviser-review gates are not separately reconciled.
priority_tally.next_action: Extract into a distinct trust/legal registry; preserve tax, asset-protection, SMSF and estate cross-links without merging domains.

priority_tally.workstream: Finance Planning to AI CFO registry
priority_tally.proven: 132 conversations and 17,356 messages mapped to the shared finance bucket; AI CFO architecture and Bill CFO service locator exist.
priority_tally.gap: Direct chat-level requirements and evidence are not mapped to isolated AI CFO modules.
priority_tally.next_action: Create entity, account, cash-flow, portfolio, tax, risk, workflow, approval and evidence registries from direct chat bodies.

priority_tally.workstream: Financial New to AI CFO registry
priority_tally.proven: 12 conversations and 8,835 messages mapped to the shared finance bucket.
priority_tally.gap: Direct requirements, overlap and supersession against Finance Planning are unclassified.
priority_tally.next_action: Extract independently, then semantic-dedupe and cross-link against Finance Planning and Bill CFO.

priority_tally.proven: 6 conversations and 2,614 messages mapped; restricted Health controls and claim-review infrastructure exist.
priority_tally.gap: Direct Longevity chat bodies and attachments are not separately reconstructed.
priority_tally.next_action: Extract under restricted-health, privacy, evidence-tier, non-diagnostic and clinical/device approval controls.

priority_tally.proven: Multiple source packs, hashes, historical archives and bounded manifests are registered.
priority_tally.gap: Some referenced binaries and inaccessible share-link attachments lack a complete denominator and immutable pointers.
priority_tally.next_action: Build attachment-reference graph, locate available Library/export/repository copies, hash recovered binaries and log irrecoverable items with reasons.

priority_tally.workstream: Canonical constitution, chronology and tracker consolidation
priority_tally.proven: V18 branch contains constitution v1.1, source-intake ledger and consolidated machine-readable/visual trackers.
priority_tally.gap: Branch CI and independent PR review are pending.
priority_tally.next_action: Run V18 verifier and CI, open draft PR, resolve review findings and merge only after passing checks.

priority_tally.proven: Five owned repositories inventoried; zero open PRs in visible scope; current heads and issue programme inspected.
priority_tally.gap: Full closed-PR semantic duplicate audit, repository capability overlap matrix and archival decisions remain.
priority_tally.next_action: Generate cross-repository ownership/capability matrix, closed-PR lineage map and non-destructive archive/supersession recommendations.

priority_tally.workstream: Bill CFO and Jarvis Health module integration
priority_tally.proven: Service isolation, locators, health controls, synthetic journeys and CFO boundaries are repository-defined.
priority_tally.gap: Full authenticated provider routes, production data and end-to-end cross-module proof are absent.
priority_tally.next_action: Keep service roots isolated; add only contract-level federation and evidence pointers until credentials and privacy approvals are supplied.

priority_tally.workstream: Command Centre and 18-layer local digital twin
priority_tally.proven: All 18 layers are exposed and exercised locally with privacy, security, persistence, retry, backup, restore, cost and rollback tests.
priority_tally.gap: Authenticated external staging and connected end-to-end proof are not complete.
priority_tally.next_action: Approve endpoints, IAM, credentials, budgets, observability and rollback ownership before connection.

priority_tally.proven: Repository contracts, runbooks and local tests exist for VTI, Hub, Health, Property and Command Centre routes.
priority_tally.gap: Provider-admin configuration, secret references, domains, databases and authorised canaries are missing.
priority_tally.next_action: Complete each provider-specific action from the critical external queue and retain redacted proof.

priority_tally.proven: Production approval and completion gates are constitutionally defined.
priority_tally.gap: Connected staging, security/privacy review, budget approval, rollback evidence and owner acceptance are incomplete.
priority_tally.next_action: Do not promote until every P0-P4 gate is passed or explicitly waived with residual risk.

exact_unblock_inputs: A genuinely newer ChatGPT export or explicit later-chat source pack containing the direct project bodies and attachments.
Provider-approved staging endpoints, IAM/service identities, secret references, databases, budgets/cost ceilings and rollback owners.
Owner/provider actions for DigitalOcean recovery, VTI token rotation, Health domain, Property webhook, Hub workflow and Cobalt canary.
truth_boundary: V18 consolidates all currently accessible evidence and advances repository governance. It does not directly classify inaccessible chats, prove a 50-100-source live XRP/HBAR run, connect external staging or authorise production.
